toast.bulkStatusAlreadyApplied: Selected upstreams already use this status
toast.bulkStatusPartialFailed: Some upstream statuses could not be updated

deleteDialog.title: Delete upstream
deleteDialog.description: Delete upstream {name}? This removes the upstream and all route bindings, but keeps the model catalog.
deleteDialog.bulkDescription: This will delete {count} upstreams and all route bindings, but keep model catalogs.

bulkConfirm.title: Confirm bulk update
bulkConfirm.description: Apply this bulk update to {count} selected items.

circuitDialog.openDescription: Open circuit for upstream "{name}" now? It will stop receiving new requests until the circuit duration ends or it is manually reset.
circuitDialog.resetDescription: Reset circuit for upstream "{name}"? It will resume receiving requests.

sheet.name: Name
sheet.existingKeys: {count} keys configured. Leave empty to keep unchanged.
sheet.protocolDefaultsDescription: When unset, the backend infers the default protocol from the compatibility type.
sheet.failureThresholdDescription: Open the upstream circuit when failures in the window reach this value (0 = disabled).
sheet.modelThresholdDescription: Open the upstream circuit when this many models are already open (0 = disabled).

modelsDialog.importSummary: Imported {importedCount}, failed {failedCount}, created {createdPlatform} platform models, created {createdRoutes} routes, reused {existingRoutes} routes
modelsDialog.syncDescription: Fetch remote models, confirm platform model names, then create platform models and route bindings.
modelsDialog.syncSearchPlaceholder: Search upstream model, platform model, protocol, or status
modelsDialog.syncSummary: {total} available{hasQuery, select, true {, {shown} shown} other {}}{hasSelected, select, true {, {selected} selected} other {}}
modelsDialog.bindingNamesRequired: Upstream model name and platform model name are required
modelsDialog.createBindingDescription: Bind an upstream model to a platform model.
modelsDialog.batchDeleteSummary: Deleted {successCount}, not found {notFoundCount}, failed {failedCount}. The upstream model catalog is kept and can be rebound by syncing.
modelsDialog.activeRouteRequiresPlatformModel: Active routes require a platform model name. To unbind, disable the route before saving.
modelsDialog.duplicateBinding: Upstream model "{upstreamModelName}" is already bound to platform model "{platformModelName}"
modelsDialog.deleteBindingDescription: Only platform route bindings are deleted. The upstream model catalog is kept and can be rebound by syncing.
modelsDialog.manageDescription: Manage configured route bindings. Rebind models through sync when needed.
modelsDialog.manageSearchPlaceholder: Search upstream model, platform model, binding code, or protocol
modelsDialog.noBindings: No route bindings. Sync models or create a binding manually.
modelsDialog.batchDeleteDescription: Delete {count} selected bindings from this upstream. The model catalog is kept and can be rebound by syncing.
modelsDialog.bulkConfirmDescription: Apply this bulk update to {count} selected bindings.
